sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (`value` Int64, `event_date` Date) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT sparkbar(5)(event_date, cnt) FROM (SELECT sum(value) AS cnt, event_date FROM test_data GROUP BY event_date);
UPDATE test_data SET value = value + 1 WHERE event_date = '2023-01-02';
SELECT sparkbar(10, toDate('2023-01-01'), toDate('2023-01-04'))(event_date, cnt) FROM (SELECT sum(value) AS cnt, event_date FROM test_data GROUP BY event_date);
